data_source_note: FULL-data first-champion gate for pitch_outcome_pre. Import-shaped (OfflineGateEvidence): a RELATIVE ECE non-inferiority-to-baseline check (threshold 0.0, PRE ECE <= LR ECE) the anti-bypass can verify. The declared absolute ECE < 0.02 bar (ADR-0014) is separately satisfied (0.000895) and shipped in the /accuracy scorecard. No promotion here (rule 6).

supplementary_checks.name: absolute_ece_bar
supplementary_checks.rationale: The ADR-0014 declared primary (absolute ECE < 0.02). NON-GATING in this import (the re-derivation gates on the relative check above); recorded because it is the declared criterion and it passes at 0.000895.

provenance.rule_13_holdout: 2026 excluded from every split (sample mirror is 2015-2025 only)
provenance.split_discipline: rolling-origin temporal CV; no random_state on any split
